title: stenocalyx duarteanus
intro: Stenocalyx duarteanus, also known as the Duarte stenocalyx, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to Brazil and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenocalyx duarteanus include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Stenocalyx duarteanus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and provide relief from its health benefits.
